item.title: Frontier Exploration - Access-Controlled Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Access-Controlled Knowledge How do we handle knowledge that requires payment, subscription, or authentication to access? The Problem An increasing amount of valuable knowledge exists behind access controls: Paid courses (Udemy, MasterClass, Skillshare) Members-only content (Su...

item.title: AI Assistance Quality Criteria
item.description: AI Assistance Quality Criteria This note provides an overview of AI-assistance capabilities for knowledge base quality evaluation.

item.title: AI-Assisted Connection Suggestion
item.description: AI-Assisted Connection Suggestion AI can suggest meaningful connections between notes that humans might miss.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: AI-Assisted Link Quality Evaluation
item.description: AI-Assisted Link Quality Evaluation AI can automatically evaluate link quality in a knowledge base.

item.title: AI-Assisted Note Splitting
item.description: AI-Assisted Note Splitting AI can identify and split oversized notes into atomic units.

item.title: AI-Assisted Orphan Detection
item.description: AI-Assisted Orphan Detection AI can automatically detect orphaned notes in a knowledge base.

item.title: Advanced Pattern Matching
item.description: Advanced Pattern Matching Using graph analysis to detect structural patterns and health issues in knowledge bases.

item.title: Building a Knowledge Base from Scratch
item.description: Building a Knowledge Base from Scratch A step-by-step guide to starting your first knowledge graph.

item.title: Capturing Negative Knowledge
item.description: Capturing Negative Knowledge Knowledge about what doesn’t work is as valuable as knowledge about what works.
